headline: Assessing Yum Brands (YUM) Valuation As Shares Show Steady Multi‑Period Returns
summary: Yum! Brands (YUM) is back on many watchlists after its recent trading session, with the stock closing at $162.92. You might be weighing that move against the company’s latest fundamentals and returns. See our latest analysis for Yum! Brands. While Yum! Brands’ 1 day share price return of 3.12% and 7 day share price return of 2.12% suggest some near term cooling, the 30 day and 90 day share price returns of 4.77% and 10.36%, together with a 5 year total shareholder return of 71.69%, indicate...
